description: Nearest User Head is a protoflux node that returns the closest user head to a slot and the head's user, or closest to the root if not provided a slot. This will also ignore the user provided to IgnoreUser (User).

fields.Reference: The slot which to use as a point to find the closest head to.
fields.IgnoreUser: The user to ignore when looking for the nearest head.
fields.IgnoreAFK: Will not return a head position from a user that is not currently focused into the world.
fields.Slot: The slot of the head when found.
fields.User: The user of the head that was found.
fields.Distance: How far away the found head was.
